# RCSMessage.Content.fileTransfer(_:)

**Case**

A content type for file transfer content.

## Declaration

```swift
case fileTransfer(RCSMessage.FileTransfer)
```

## Working with file transfers

- **RCSMessage.FileTransfer**: A structure that represents file transfer content in an RCS message.
